CustomField.description: Box is checked when the revenue and expense budgets Match, and unchecked when they do not match. This field is then used in a formula field to prevent submission when budgets do not match. Update logic is performed in the Application_Budget_Display flow.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Box is checked when the revenue and expense budgets Match, and unchecked when they do not match.
CustomField.label: Budget Match
